about.title: About
about.description: Company about sections: mission story with stats, founder quote, and milestone timeline; plus a values card grid with a token-built culture collage.

variants.name: Story
variants.description: Mission statement, stats row, founder quote, and a milestone timeline.

variants.name: Values
variants.description: A values card grid with icons and a token-built culture collage.

account-security.title: Account security
account-security.description: Two-factor authentication setup and password management with a danger zone.

variants.name: Two-factor setup
variants.description: Status card plus QR pairing, setup key, and one-time backup codes.

variants.name: Password & danger zone
variants.description: Password change with strength meter, recovery email, and a danger zone.

activity-feed.title: Activity Feed
activity-feed.description: A vertical timeline of recent events with toned icons, timestamps, and detail.

ai-response.title: AI Response
ai-response.description: An assistant answer card with formatted content, cited sources, and feedback and regenerate actions.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Admin analytics surfaces — KPI metrics with sparklines, a 30-day traffic trend and top pages/referrers breakdowns with progress bars, plus a cohort-retention engagement variant built from token-colored heat cells.

variants.name: Traffic overview
variants.description: KPI metrics with sparklines, a 30-day traffic trend and top pages and referrers breakdowns.

variants.name: Engagement cohorts
variants.description: Retention stat cards plus a weekly cohort heat grid built from token-colored cells.

api-keys.title: API keys
api-keys.description: API key management with masked secrets, scopes, and a scoped create flow.

variants.name: Key list
variants.description: Masked keys with reveal and copy, scope badges, and usage metadata.

variants.name: Create key
variants.description: Scoped key creation with expiry and a one-time generated-key reveal.

app-shell-chrome.title: App Shell
app-shell-chrome.description: A sidebar + header application shell that wraps page content — the chrome the (app) route group uses for dashboard pages.

audit-log.title: Audit log
audit-log.description: A security audit trail — a grouped-by-day timeline feed with actor avatars, emphasized actor/object names and severity badges, plus a filterable table variant with event-type badges, actors, IPs and expandable detail hints.

variants.name: Day-grouped timeline
variants.description: A grouped-by-day security feed with actor avatars, emphasized names and severity badges.

variants.name: Filterable table
variants.description: A filterable event table with type badges, actors, IP addresses and detail affordances.

billing.title: Billing

variants.name: Subscription
variants.description: Current plan, usage meters, payment method, and a downloadable invoice history.

variants.name: Plan selector
variants.description: Three-tier plan picker with a highlighted popular plan and a monthly/annual toggle.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Blog index layouts: a featured hero post with a responsive post grid, and an editorial list with larger typography.

variants.name: Featured grid
variants.description: A featured hero post above a responsive three-column post grid.

variants.name: Editorial list
variants.description: An editorial list layout with larger typography and horizontal cards.

blog-post.title: Blog post
blog-post.description: Article detail layouts with token-styled prose (headings, blockquote, inline code), author card, hero art, and a share row.

variants.description: A single-column article with token-styled prose and a share row.

variants.name: With sidebar
variants.description: The article beside a sticky table of contents and a newsletter card.

cancel-flow.title: Cancel Flow

cart.title: Cart

variants.description: Full cart page with editable line items and an order summary.

variants.name: Drawer
variants.description: Slide-over mini cart with a free-shipping meter and quick checkout.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: A product release feed on a vertical timeline with version badges, dates, and typed Feature/Fix/Perf change rows.

chat-thread.title: Chat Thread

variants.description: Wizard checkout with a shipping–payment–review stepper and back/continue navigation.

variants.name: Split with visual
variants.description: Copy and checkmark bullets beside a token-built product mock panel.

landing.description: A single polished marketing page — hero, features, pricing, testimonials, FAQ, and a call to action — with a real navbar and footer.

saas.title: SaaS
saas.description: A complete multi-page SaaS app: split login/signup, and a sidebar-shell dashboard, analytics, team, billing and settings — all from validated blocks.

store.title: Store
store.description: A complete, navigable storefront: home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, auth, and account — all from validated blocks.
